description: Inventory intent loads fixture inventory and answers a grounded count question.

description: RAG path answers a food-safety question citing the fixture knowledge document.

input.query: How long can I keep raw chicken in the fridge?

knowledgeDocuments.title: Raw chicken storage
knowledgeDocuments.content: Raw chicken keeps 1-2 days refrigerated at or below 40F; freeze it for longer storage.

replay.output: Raw chicken keeps 1-2 days in the fridge at or below 40F (source: kb-chicken-safety-1). Freeze it if you need longer.

prohibitedClaims: chicken keeps for a month in the fridge

description: Expiry path builds a freshness plan from fixture dates and inventory.

replay.output: Nothing is close to expiring: the milk is dated 2099-06-01 and the spinach 2099-05-01, so eat the loose tomatoes first.

description: Organization path produces a grounded reorganization plan over known items and zones.

output.summary: Move the spinach up next to the other fresh produce-adjacent items for visibility.

moves.rationale: Keep leafy greens visible so they are used before wilting.

description: Placement correction moves the selected item to a valid directional target zone.

description: Deterministic space calculation reports zone occupancy from fixture ratios.

description: Durable memory removal is extracted, validated, written, and verified via reload.

description: Ambiguous query terminates its response lane at request_clarification without inventing facts; the concurrent memory lane drains last, so the run's final trajectory node is memory_lane_finished.
